i %3C len(history)-1; i++ %7B%0A%09%09if history%5Bi%5D != history%5Bi+1%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%94%82   %22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22    %22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09if history != %22%22 %7B%0A%09%09if history%5Blen(history)-1%5D == 'l' %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%94%8C%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%22)%0A%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09fmt.Print(%22%E2%94%94%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%E2%94%80%22)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09if node == nil %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22#%22)%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09fmt.Println(node.Value)%0A%09if node.Left != nil %7C%7C node.Right != nil %7B%0A%09%09BShow(node.Right, history+%22r%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09var parts %5B%5Dstring%0A%0A%09// L%C3%AA absolutamente todas as linhas e junta as palavras.%0A%09// Isso blinda o c%C3%B3digo contra espa%C3%A7os duplos e linhas vazias!%0A%09for scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09line := scanner.Text()%0A%09%09tokens := strings.Fields(line)%0A%09%09parts = append(parts, tokens...)%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09// Processa TODAS as %C3%A1rvores dispon%C3%ADveis na entrada,%0A%09// impedindo que o programa morra ap%C3%B3s ler uma %C3%A1rvore vazia (%22#%22).%0A%09for len(parts) %3E 0 %7B%0A%09%09root := create(&parts)%0A%09%09BShow(root, %22%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0A
